strengths: Current hands-on agentic-AI infrastructure work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and frameworks supporting agentic workflows — directly adjacent to the role's core architecture mandate

Deep distributed-systems credentials: micro-services handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency async I/O at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, plus an event-driven, Kubernetes-deployable platform he founded and still operates

Meaningful fintech exposure — investment-platform engineering at RIDE Capital and multi-country algorithmic pricing optimization at Optilyz — combined with 19+ years of full-stack breadth and a strong craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: No formal executive or CTO-level title; leadership evidence is founder work, staff-level roles, and teaching rather than documented senior technical leadership at scale-ups
No stated track record of scaling an engineering organization from 10 to 30+ people or building a senior leadership layer
Agentic AI experience is in developer tooling and infrastructure rather than demonstrated production multi-agent decisioning systems operating in regulated, high-stakes environments

key_factors.factor: Hands-on agentic-AI and MCP infrastructure experience
Production-grade distributed and event-driven systems depth
Absence of demonstrated executive team-scaling record

response.justification: This candidate maps unusually well onto the technical core of the role: he is actively building agentic-AI infrastructure and MCP tooling today, and his background spans exactly the systems substrate the job demands — event-driven architecture, micro-services at millions of requests per second, low-latency real-time data handling, and Kubernetes-based platform operation. His fintech chapters at RIDE Capital and Optilyz gave him direct exposure to investment products and algorithmic, multi-jurisdiction pricing, while nearly two decades of shipping across web, mobile, embedded and backend systems — plus founding and sustaining an open-source geo-data platform used in production by Green Map — evidence the ownership, pragmatism and architectural judgment a CTO needs. His long record of mentoring, workshops and course-building signals genuine leadership instincts and communication ability; the open question is executive scope rather than technical ceiling, and on technical grounds he presents a credible, high-upside fit for an agentic-AI fintech leadership role.
